description: Canonical labels for future StockAI backtesting, supervised learning, and ActionCode evaluation.

max_gain_1d.description: Maximum favorable excursion within 1 trading day.

max_gain_3d.description: Maximum favorable excursion within 3 trading days.

max_gain_5d.description: Maximum favorable excursion within 5 trading days.

max_drawdown_1d.description: Maximum adverse excursion within 1 trading day.

max_drawdown_3d.description: Maximum adverse excursion within 3 trading days.

max_drawdown_5d.description: Maximum adverse excursion within 5 trading days.

target_hit_label.description: Whether target return was reached within the test window.

stop_loss_hit_label.description: Whether stop-loss threshold was reached within the test window.

target_before_stop_label.description: Whether target was reached before stop-loss.

stop_before_target_label.description: Whether stop-loss was reached before target.

false_breakout_label.description: Whether breakout failed and reversed below trigger.

vwap_hold_label.description: Whether price maintained VWAP support after signal.

dead_cat_bounce_label.description: Whether rebound failed after a prior decline.

distribution_layer_label.description: Whether selling pressure emerged near resistance.

risk_reduction_success_label.description: Whether risk-reduction action reduced subsequent drawdown.

avoid_success_label.description: Whether avoid decision prevented poor risk-adjusted outcome.

buy_now_success_label.description: Whether BUY_NOW decision met target-before-stop criteria.

buy_on_pullback_success_label.description: Whether pullback entry produced favorable outcome.
